attributes.style: padding: 0px 14px;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr); gap: 2px; margin-bottom: 4px;

aspect-ratio: 1 / 1.05; border-radius: 6px; background: transparent; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; padding: 4px 5px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between;
